title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 413.130 - Investigations by director
text:
413.130.  Investigations by director. — The director is authorized to conduct such investigations as deemed appropriate to resolve complaints, develop information on prevailing procedures in commercial quantity determination and on possible violations of the provisions of sections 413.005 to 413.229.
(L. 1983 H.B. 729, A.L. 1994 S.B. 729)
